scripts.deploy:prod: npm run build && firebase deploy --project prod
scripts.deploy:staging: npm run build:staging && firebase deploy --project staging
scripts.preview:staging: npm run build:staging && firebase hosting:channel:deploy staging-review --project staging
scripts.deploy:pages: npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name dsf-studio
scripts.deploy:pages:staging: npm run build:staging && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name dsf-studio --branch staging
